title: The Best Order To Watch Yellowstone & Its Many Spinoffs
summary: The Yellowstone universe has begun to grow, sprouting various spinoff series which span several generations. Here's the proper viewing order.

fullArticle:
With so many shows in Taylor Sheridan's neo-Western universe, it can be confusing to figure out where to start and to know in what order to watch Yellowstone. Taylor Sheridan's drama is one of the best TV Westerns of all time, quickly branching into a multi-series universe that follows the Dutton family tree at various points in history. Each series in the Yellowstone universe follows the trials and tribulations of the Duttons, a family of ranchers who settled in Montana in the late 19th century. The first Yellowstone spinoff shows, 1883 and 1923, are prequels, making the order relatively straightforward.

However, with more Yellowstone spinoffs on the way, this won't be the case for long. Marshals and Dutton Ranch are the two newest shows in the franchise, with Marshals season 1 arriving ...
